tasks.label: Jekyll Serve
tasks.command: export PATH="$HOME/.rbenv/bin:$HOME/.rbenv/shims:$PATH" && eval "$(rbenv init -)" && bundle exec jekyll serve --livereload

tasks.label: Jekyll Serve
tasks.command: export PATH="$HOME/.rbenv/bin:$HOME/.rbenv/shims:$PATH" && eval "$(rbenv init -)" && bundle exec jekyll serve
